page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: HIST291 or JWST231.

HIST299 Directed Research (1-3 Credits)

Closely guided research in primary sources for students currently enrolled in selected 100- or 200-level surveys in the Department of History. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-History department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

HIST304 The Baddest Decade: The 1970s in American Film and American History (3 Credits)

The history of the United States and of its cinema in the 1970s. Cross-listed with: CINE352.
